zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Gascoigne II於大約1386年出生在英國越可爾加福索普時，他的父親Sir William Gascoigne I38歲，母親Elizabeth Mowbray47歲。他於大約1399年與Joan Wyman在英國越可爾希亞活結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1422年在英國藍卡爾被列為steward, constable and master forester of knaresborough。他去世於1422年1月2日之前在法國，埋葬在法國瑟-吉馬內米奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Gascoigne II于大约1386年出生在英国越可爾加福索普时，他的父亲Sir William Gascoigne I38岁，母亲Elizabeth Mowbray47岁。他于大约1399年与Joan Wyman在英国越可爾希亞活结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1422年在英国藍卡爾被列为steward, constable and master forester of knaresborough。他去世于1422年1月2日之前在法国，埋葬在法国瑟-吉馬內米奧。

nameMeanings.name: Gascoigne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Gascon, Middle English Gascoun, Gascon ‘Gascon, native of Gascony’ or the adjective Gascuinz ‘of Gascony’. The name of the region derives from that of the Basques, who are found close by and formerly extended into this region as well; they are first named in Roman sources as Vascōnes, but the original meaning of the name derived from a root eusk- in the non-Indo-European language that they still speak today, is completely obscure. By the Middle Ages the Basques had been displaced from most of Gascony by speakers of Gascon (a dialect of Occitan, related to French), who were proverbial for their boastfulness. In the 11th century Gascony united with Aquitaine and was thus held by England between 1154 and 1453.

variants.name: Gascon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Jaime, Mario, Miguel, Rafael, Ruben, Amado, Ana, Ana Maria, Angel, Caridad.  French Andre, Chantal, Jean-Guy, Jean-Philippe, Monique, Serge, Simonne.
French; Spanish (Gascón): habitational name for someone from the province of Gascony, Old French Gascogne (see Gascoigne ). This surname is also found in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Gascoigne II was born about 1386, in Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir William Gascoigne I, was 38 and his mother, Elizabeth Mowbray, was 47. He married Joan Wyman about 1399, in Harewood, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. In 1422, at the age of 37, his occupation is listed as steward, constable and master forester of knaresborough in Lancashire, England. He died before 2 January 1422, in France, and was buried in Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Gascoigne II est né environ 1386, à Gawthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Gascoigne I, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mowbray, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Joan Wyman environ 1399, à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. En 1422, à l’âge de 37 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est steward, constable and master forester of knaresborough à Lancashire, Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 2 janvier 1422, à France, et a été enterré à Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Gascoigne II um 1386 in Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Gascoigne I 38 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Mowbray 47. Er hat um 1399 in Harewood, Yorkshire, England Joan Wyman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1422, als er 37 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als steward, constable and master forester of knaresborough in Lancashire, England aufgeführt. Er starb vor 2. Januar 1422 in Frankreich und wurde in Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Gascoigne II è nato il circa 1386 nel Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Gascoigne I, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Mowbray, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Joan Wyman circa 1399, nel Harewood, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1422, all'età di 37 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come steward, constable and master forester of knaresborough nel Lancashire, England. Morì prima del 2 gennaio 1422, nel Francia, e fu sepolto a Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Gascoigne IIが約1386年にイギリスヨークシュアイアガウソルペで生まれた時，父Sir William Gascoigne Iは38歳，母Elizabeth Mowbrayは47歳であった。約1399年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドでJoan Wymanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1422年，37歳の時，イギリスランカシュアイアでの職業はsteward, constable and master forester of knaresboroughと記録されている。彼は1422年1月2日以前にフランスで死去し，フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメアウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Gascoigne II(이)가 대략 1386년 영국 요르크실르 가w소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Gascoigne I(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Mowbray(은)는 47세였다. 그는 대략 1399년 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에서 Joan Wyman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1422년, 37세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 랭카실르에서 steward, constable and master forester of knaresborough이었다. 그는 1422년 1월 2일 이전 프랑스에서 사망했으며 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 모스에 묻혔다.

pt.from 14 December 1419 to 23 December 141: de 14 de dezembro de 1419 a 23 de dezembro de 1419
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Gascoigne II nasceu aproximadamente 1386, em Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Gascoigne I, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mowbray, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Wyman aproximadamente 1399, em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1422, com 37 anos, sua profissão aparece como steward, constable and master forester of knaresborough em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 2 de janeiro de 1422, em França, e foi sepultado em Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Gascoigne II родился около 1386 г. в местности гавтаурп, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Gascoigne I было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mowbray, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Wyman около 1399 г. в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. В 1422 году, в возрасте 37 лет,  он работал по профессии steward, constable and master forester of knaresborough в местности ланкашир, Англия. Он умер перед 2 январь 1422 г. в местности Франция и был похоронен в местности мокс, сине-ет-марн, Франция.

Se casó con Joan Wyman aproximadamente 1399, en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1422, a la edad de 37 años, su ocupación registrada era steward, constable and master forester of knaresborough en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Murió antes de 2 de enero de 1422, en Francia, y fue sepultado en Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, Francia.
